name: io.github.continuum-ai-corp/orcadub-mcp-server
description: AI video dubbing via OrcaRouter (model orca/dub): upload a video or pass a URL, submit a dubbing job, poll status, download the dubbed result.

environmentVariables.name: ORCADUB_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OrcaRouter API key (sk-orca-...). Create one at https://www.orcarouter.ai/console.
